comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (Moderato) + Refrain (not fast). Pipeline has stacked-verse garble in m17 (7L/4n). m50 gap (1n), m52 gap (1n). Several OCR misreads: spurious periods, missing syllables, garbled tokens.

2.comment: Pipeline had 'a. ny gamb ling Ca.' (5L/6n) -- spurious periods on 'a.' and 'Ca.'. Published: 'a-ny gamb-ling Ca-'. Correcting to remove periods.

6.comment: Pipeline had 'tell you that a, be' (5L/6n) -- stray comma on 'a,'. Published: 'tell you that a be-'.

7.comment: Pipeline had 'gin net Comes' (3L/3n). OCR garble 'net' for 'ner'. Published: 'gin-ner Comes'.

9.comment: Pipeline had 'win Be' (2L/2n). Pipeline dropped 'ner.' -- 'Be' belongs to next phrase. Published: 'win-ner.' on the 2 notes (with rests following).

10.comment: Pipeline had 'gin ner fish ing for' (5L/6n). With m9 corrected to 'win ner.', 'Be' moves here. Published: 'Be-gin-ner fish-ing for' (6 syllables on 6 notes).

11.comment: Pipeline had 'fioun der Will' (3L/3n). OCR garble 'fioun' for 'floun'. Published: 'floun-der Will'.

12.comment: Pipeline had 'catch a. sev en teen' (5L/6n). Spurious period in 'a.'. Published: 'catch a sev-en-teen'.

17.comment: STACKED 7L/4n. Pipeline read interleaved v1/v2: 'thought n ' ab love Surd, with But'. Published v1: 'thought ab-surd, But'.

23.comment: Pipeline had 'Ere got be' (3L/3n). OCR garble 'Ere' for 'I've'. Published: 'I've got be-'.

26.comment: Pipeline had 'I'm in love With' (4L/5n). Missing 'you.' and wrong capitalization. Published: 'I'm in love with you.' (5 syllables on 5 notes).

29.comment: Pipeline had 'got be' (2L/3n). Missing 'I've'. Published: 'I've got be-' (3 syllables on 3 notes).

31.comment: Pipeline had 'nev er was such a. smile' (6L/6n). Spurious period in 'a.'. Published: 'nev-er was such a smile'.

32.comment: Pipeline had 'Or such such of' (4L/5n). Duplicate 'such' -- second should be 'eyes'. Published: 'Or such eyes of'.

37.comment: Pipeline had 'than a.' (2L/4n). Spurious period and missing syllables. Published: 'much more than a' (4 syllables on 4 notes).

44.comment: Pipeline had 'gin ners luck,' (3L/3n). Missing apostrophe in 'ners'. Published: 'gin-ner's luck,'.

46.comment: Pipeline had 'through, Cause the' (3L/3n). Missing leading apostrophe on 'Cause. Published: 'through, 'Cause the'.

50.comment: GAP: 1 note + 3 rests, no lyrics in pipeline. Published: 'you.' (first ending).

52.comment: GAP: 1 note + 1 rest, no lyrics in pipeline. Published: 'you.' (second ending).
